nodes.context: Barra brava of Club Atlético Independiente, largest and strongest in Argentina.
Barra brava of Racing de Avellaneda, main football rival of Independiente.
Barra brava of San Lorenzo de Almagro.
Sub-group of La Barra Del Rojo.
Mentioned in relation to a leader of Los Polacos.

edges.evidence_quote: During its existence, the barra brava has had several fights and altercations with the Argentine police and with other barras bravas, especially with that of Racing de Avellaneda ( La Guardia Imperial ), Independiente's main football rival;
edges.context: La Barra Del Rojo has had fights with La Guardia Imperial, the barra brava of Racing de Avellaneda.

edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12), River Plate ( Los Borrachos del Tablón ) and San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa), also rivals of the club.
edges.context: La Barra Del Rojo had major confrontations with La 12.

edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12), River Plate ( Los Borrachos del Tablón ) and San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa), also rivals of the club.
edges.context: La Barra Del Rojo had major confrontations with Los Borrachos del Tablón.

edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12), River Plate ( Los Borrachos del Tablón ) and San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa), also rivals of the club.
edges.context: La Barra Del Rojo had major confrontations with La Gloriosa.

edges.evidence_quote: The most important are: Fiorito , La Tranquila , La Banda de San Justo , Los Polacos , Los camioneros , Villa Corina , Los Rana , Los Bera , Los Narigones , Los Gerlis , La 4 de Julio , La Pepsi , etc.;
edges.context: Los Polacos is a sub-group of La Barra Del Rojo.

edges.evidence_quote: According to 2006 research reports, "Polaco" (the chief of the sub-group Los Polacos and one of the leaders of Los Diablos Rojos) was the bodyguard of Hugo Moyano (the secretary general of the CGT) 15 years ago and still holds that role.
edges.context: The chief of Los Polacos is also one of the leaders of Los Diablos Rojos, indicating a leadership overlap.
